name: acacia_vs_non_acacia_v1
description: Binary spatial classifier: Acacia-type crowns vs clean non-acacia crowns. Sanjay Van field tree_type is used as Acacia positive when available.
notes: Now trainable after adding Sanjay Van; current package has about 65 positive Acacia crowns. Validate with leave-one-area-out because positives are concentrated in SV areas.
